eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: Mississippi; at 3:07 PM on JUN 8, 2026 Effective until 4:07 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Zykerian Quentavius MAGEE is wanted in connection to an officer involved shooting in Mount Olive, Covington County that occurred on 6/8/2026 at approximately 3:38 p.m. Please call 9 1 1 immediately if you see Zykerian Quentavius MAGEE or observe any suspicious activity. Zykerian Quentavius MAGEE is described as a Black Male 19 years of age, 6 feet and 3 INCHES inches tall 185 pounds, with Brown eyes and Black hair. He was last seen in the 200 block South Bluff Street on 6/8/2026 at approximately 3:38 p.m. and was wearing a black hoodie. Zykerian Quentavius MAGEE may be traveling ON FOOT. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this dangerous suspect, please call 9 1 1 or the Mississippi Bureau of Investigation at 8 5 5 6 4 2 5 3 7 8
